ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity available */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date of the last restock */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (length, width, height) */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is currently active */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping method used */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date of the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  "total_discount" REAL /* Total discount applied to the order */,
  "is_gift" INTEGER /* Indicates if the order is a gift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_method_id") REFERENCES shipping_methods ("shipping_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount for the specific item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the specific item */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse from which the item is shipped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "is_authorized" INTEGER /* Indicates if the supplier is authorized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product affected */,
  "change_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity changed (positive for restock, negative for adjustments) */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., restock, adjustment) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the change occurred */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "is_subscribed_to_newsletter" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount the customer has spent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_methods" (
  "shipping_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping method (e.g., Standard, Express) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the shipping method */,
  "delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated delivery time for the shipping method */,
  "is_insured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the shipping method includes insurance */,
  "minimum_order_value" REAL /* Minimum order value required for the shipping method */,
  "maximum_order_value" REAL /* Maximum order value allowed for the shipping method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being paid */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded, if applicable */,
  "is_refunded" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment has been refunded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the inventory or orders */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
